历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 21139 → 19205 → 56064 → 29456 → 25574. In 2023, there was an abnormal drop to 56064, followed by a significant recovery to 29456 in 2024, and further recovery to 25574 in 2025, showing a clear warming trend in the past two years, with a baseline of about 25574 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 208 in 2021, 220 in 2022, 219 in 2023, 230 in 2024, and 243 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 240, a decrease of 3 from 2025, plus 54 in Medical Category (originally part of Physics Category), making the total Physics + Medicine 294, an actual expansion of about 21% compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 243, but the pure Physics Category plan slightly decreased, leading to changes in competition structure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing its comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving university management response incidents (such as the clarification of the cat abuse rumor), with no serious filing gaps or negative public opinion shocks. Douyin heat total ranking is 8th (high heat), with high short video exposure and relatively high application attention. In 2025, the abnormal filing signal was high attention, but mainly related to low-score admissions in a few unpopular majors in Heilongjiang, not reflecting the overall trend. The university's traditional advantageous disciplines include Chemistry, Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, etc., with overall disciplinary strength ranking among the top of 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to have high social heat, highly matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Gaokao examinees is about 609,800, slightly increased from 606,754 in 2025, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 364,660 (based on the recent proportion of about 59.8%), leading to a small expansion of the competition base. Zhengzhou University is located in Henan Province (neighboring province), with a large enrollment scale in Hebei Province, with 243 in Physics Category and 22 in History Category in 2025, having strong regional appeal to Hebei examinees. There is no local protective enrollment tilt.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 25574, the slight decrease of 3 in the 2026 Physics Category plan but expansion in Medical Category, high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, continuous improvement in Soft Science ranking, and a small increase in total examinees, it is expected that competition in the 2026 Physics Category will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings continuing to recover slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 25185, with a range of 24685–25685.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 24000), you can focus on hitting popular Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (outside 25500), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Mathematics and Mechanical, and use Tier 3 majors like Water Resources and English as a stable safety net.

The enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 33 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 22 in 2025. After a sharp reduction in 2024, there was a slight recovery in 2025. In 2026, the History Category plan is 28, an increase of 6 from 2025, an expansion of about 27%. Although the absolute increase is not large, the proportion is relatively high, which will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science Chinese University main ranking has risen continuously from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years, with increasing comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no serious negative public opinion impact. The total Douyin popularity ranking is 8th (high heat), with high short video exposure and relatively high application attention. The 2025 abnormal admission signal is high attention, but mainly involves individual majors in the Physics Category, with limited impact on the History Category. The university's traditional advantageous disciplines include law, Chinese language and literature, and other liberal arts directions, with overall disciplinary strength ranking among the top of 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social heat recommendation, Chinese Language/Literature has high social heat recommendation, highly matching the History Category admission majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, History, etc.). Zhengzhou University is located in Henan Province (neighboring province), with a small enrollment scale in Hebei History Category (22 in 2025), offering some regional appeal to Hebei liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3521, the 2026 History Category expansion of 6 students (+27%), high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, continuously rising Soft Science ranking, high popularity of law/Chinese language majors, and a slight increase in total examinees, the ranking-boosting effect of expansion and the competition-intensifying effect of rising heat offset each other. It is expected that the 2026 History Category ranking will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3897, with a range of 3397–4397.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Zhengzhou University's medical category in Hebei Province have shown a continuous upward trend over the past five years: 14,272 in 2021, 17,032 in 2022, 20,057 in 2023, 28,695 in 2024, and 30,194 in 2025. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 34 students in 2021, 34 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 46 in 2025, with a gradual small-scale expansion. The 2026 plan further expands to 54 students, an increase of 8 students from 2025, with an expansion rate of about 17.4%, the largest expansion in recent years. Expansion usually makes the admission ranking number larger (easier to admit), but the continuous upward trend in recent years also reflects the unabated popularity of medical applications.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Zhengzhou City, Henan Province, and is a comprehensive university. Its medical disciplines have a long history, with clinical medicine and other majors having strong influence in the region. The overall school strength and medical discipline reputation have a sustained appeal to Hebei candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application popularity nationwide, with core medical majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Hebei Province, as a major college entrance examination province, has limited medical enrollment scale. Zhengzhou University, as a 211 university in a neighboring province, offers high cost-effectiveness and regional appeal for its medical majors to Hebei candidates, and it is expected that the application popularity will remain high in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Zhengzhou University's medical category in Hebei Province in 2026 will be approximately 33,045, which is later (easier to admit) compared to 2025, mainly due to the significant expansion. The expected admission range is between 32,549 and 33,541. It is recommended that candidates position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
